# MailFrame

> MailFrame is a Chrome extension that adds an AI side-panel to Gmail. It summarizes email threads, flags each thread's priority, extracts orders and invoices, and surfaces what needs attention — right where you read email. Email is processed on demand and is never stored.

## Pages

- [Home](https://mailframe.org/): Product overview and features
- [Pricing](https://mailframe.org/pricing.html): Free, Pro ($12/mo), and Business ($79/mo) plans
- [FAQ](https://mailframe.org/faq.html): Install, activation, privacy, supported languages, plans, and troubleshooting
- [Privacy Policy](https://mailframe.org/privacy.html): How your data is handled
- [Terms of Service](https://mailframe.org/terms.html): Terms governing use of the extension and website

## Features

- Instant thread summaries — decisions, open questions, and your next move (press S)
- Priority indicator — every thread flagged High, Normal, or Low
- Focus reader — distraction-free text with optional bionic reading
- Order & document extraction — line items, totals, and dates exported to CSV
- Daily brief — a short rundown of the threads that need you

## Contact

- Email: support@mailframe.org
